sagemaker-ai:hyperpod-nccl.note: Re-reviewed 2026-07-21 after AWS changed the skill (the 2026-07-09 acceptance lapsed on content drift, exactly as intended). Both flags are false positives, verified against the bytes at the catalog pin. (1) 'obfuscated payload to shell' - nccl-diagnose.sh base64-encodes its OWN locally-defined $script_body to ship it over AWS SSM, because SSM's command parameter takes a single element; the comment above the line says so, and there is no remote fetch anywhere in the pipeline (contrast the real threat shape, curl <url> | base64 -d | bash). (2) 'reads a secret env var' - $token is an AWS API pagination cursor passed to --next-token and validated against a base64 shape; it is a local loop variable, not a credential. Detector-side fixes for both FP classes tracked separately. Hash corrected 2026-07-21: the first re-accept recorded a hash computed on a Windows checkout with core.autocrlf=true, which hashes CRLF bytes and can never match the Linux watch (LF). Recomputed with autocrlf disabled.
